app.name: Sehat
landing.subtitle: Ek modern rehabilitation app — AI se bana hua plan, daily tracking, aur doctor ki nigrani.
landing.feature1.title: Smart Plan
landing.feature1.body: AI se bana personalized recovery plan jo aapki pragati ke saath badalta hai.
landing.feature2.title: Daily Jaanch
landing.feature2.body: Apna dard aur exercise rozana log karein aur trend dekhein.
landing.feature3.title: Doctor ki Nigrani
landing.feature3.body: Doctor sabhi mareezo ko ek jagah dekh sakte hain aur jaldi madad kar sakte hain.
role.title: Sehat mein swagat hai
role.subtitle: Aap Sehat ka istemal kaise karenge — humein bataiye.
role.patientDesc: Apne liye recovery plan paayein aur rozana progress track karein.
role.adminDesc: Mareezo ko dekhein, plan badlein, aur clinical notes likhein.
onboarding.title: Sehat mein swagat hai
onboarding.subtitle: Aaiye aapki recovery shuru karte hain
onboarding.profileDesc: Apni samasya bataiye taaki AI aapke liye sahi plan bana sake.
onboarding.symptoms.placeholder: Aapko kya mehsoos ho raha hai, kab se hai, aur kab badhta hai...
onboarding.report.help: MRI, X-ray ya doctor ka note upload karein (PDF, JPG)
onboarding.submit: Profile save karein aur plan banaayein
onboarding.generatingDesc: Aapka personal recovery plan ban raha hai...
onboarding.error: Profile save nahi ho payi. Phir se koshish karein.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subscription.free: Aap Sehat Free plan par hain.
settings.subscription.paid: Aap Sehat Premium plan par hain.
learn.title: Sehat Sikhein
learn.subtitle: HealthBits360 ke saath chhoti aur kaam ki recovery jaankari.
